title: psammopyrum fontqueri
intro: Psammopyrum fontqueri, also known as Fontquer's sandwort, is a perennial plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, and it is sometimes used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Psammopyrum fontqueri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
